title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: A critically acclaimed open-world RPG with choices that shape the fate of the world.
longDescription: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is an open-world action RPG set in a visually stunning fantasy universe. You are Geralt of Rivia, a mercenary monster hunter in search of your adopted daughter, a child of prophecy. Explore corrupted cities, dark forests, and dive into over 100 hours of content.

title: Hades
description: A rogue-like dungeon crawler where you defy the god of death in a beautifully hand-drawn underworld.
longDescription: Hades is a god-like rogue-like dungeon crawler that combines the best aspects of Supergiant's critically acclaimed titles. Battle out of the Underworld of Greek myth using the powers and blessings of Olympus. Every run is different, and every death makes you stronger.

title: Hollow Knight
description: A challenging metroidvania set in a beautifully hand-drawn underground kingdom of insects.
longDescription: Hollow Knight is a classically styled 2D action-adventure game set in a vast and hauntingly beautiful underground kingdom. Forge your own path in an enormous underground world as you explore twisting caverns, battle tainted creatures and escape intricate traps.

title: Civilization VI
description: Build an empire to stand the test of time in this legendary turn-based strategy game.
longDescription: Civilization VI offers new ways to interact with your world, expand your empire across the map, advance your culture, and compete against history's greatest leaders to build a civilization that will stand the test of time.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: An epic tale of life in America's unforgiving heartland set in the dying days of the outlaw era.
longDescription: America, 1899. The end of the Wild West era has begun. After a robbery goes badly wrong in the western town of Blackwater, Arthur Morgan and the Van der Linde gang are forced to flee. With federal agents and the best bounty hunters in the nation massing on their heels, the gang must rob, steal and fight their way across the rugged heartland of America.

title: Resident Evil Village
description: Fight to survive in a mysterious village filled with terrifying enemies in this first-person survival horror.
longDescription: Set a few years after the horrifying events of Resident Evil 7 biohazard, the all-new story begins with Ethan Winters and his wife Mia living peacefully in a new location, free from their past nightmares. Just as they are building their new life together, tragedy befalls them once again.

title: EA Sports FC 24
description: The world's game with HyperMotionV technology, bringing football to life like never before.
longDescription: EA SPORTS FC 24 is the start of the most authentic football experience ever created. With over 19,000 fully licensed players, 700+ teams, and 30+ leagues, plus HyperMotionV technology that uses volumetric data captured from over 180 realmatches.

title: Elden Ring
description: A vast open-world action RPG crafted by FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin. Die. Learn. Conquer.
longDescription: THE NEW FANTASY ACTION RPG. Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between. A vast world where open fields with a variety of situations and huge dungeons with complex and three-dimensional designs are seamlessly connected.

title: Celeste
description: Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain.
longDescription: A narrative-driven precision platformer about a young woman's struggle with her inner demons as she climbs Celeste Mountain. Featuring over 700 screens of devious challenges, a deeply personal story, and a gorgeous original score.

title: Age of Empires IV
description: One of the most beloved real-time strategy games returns with new ways to expand an empire.
longDescription: Age of Empires IV puts you at the center of epic historical battles that shaped the world. Choose from 8 civilizations, each with unique units and playstyles. Build cities, manage resources, and lead your armies across 4 historically authentic campaigns spanning 500 years of history.

title: The Last of Us Part I
description: Experience the emotional journey of Joel and Ellie in a post-apocalyptic world rebuilt from the ground up.
longDescription: Experience the emotional storytelling and unforgettable characters of Joel and Ellie in The Last of Us, winner of over 200 Game of the Year awards. This remake, built from the ground up, offers a faithful recreation of the original paired with enhanced gameplay and improved exploration.

title: Dead Space
description: Isaac Clarke must face a nightmare when his ship is overrun by grotesque alien monsters.
longDescription: The sci-fi survival horror classic Dead Space returns, completely rebuilt from the ground up by Motive Studio. Harnessing the power of the Frostbite engine, this remake delivers elevated visuals and immersive audio alongside a deeper story experience while preserving the gameplay that defined the original.
